name: Light Pill #12 - The Flame Keeper
description: The Flame Keeper - A glowing capsule that reveals the language of transformation and the secrets carried in every spark. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Ash-gray leather armor with glowing ember patterns
Charred boots that leave smoking footprints
Forgotten forge with floating anvils and liquid fire rivers
What the fire takes, it returns as something new. What you fear to burn is what you need to release.
You must carry the eternal flame through three chambers - one of memory, one of present truth, and one of potential. What burns away in each chamber cannot follow you further.
Must be taken near an open flame

properties.ai_prompt: Dramatic fashion editorial of The Flame Keeper in a forgotten forge with floating anvils and rivers of liquid fire, wearing ash-gray leather armor with glowing ember patterns, holding an ever-burning torch. Crimson Ember aura with Controlled Burn energy, charred boots leaving smoking footprints, cinematic lighting that captures the dance of flames and shadows, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible heat distortion and ember particles floating in the air.
